config.oracle: p3_02 cross-fitted ensemble (4 architectures x 5 folds), deterministic refit

rl_necessity_decision.rationale: Even query-budget-2048 search reaches only -100.00% of the exact one-edit reference (normalized); strong search is insufficient within practical budgets, so RL has a potential quality advantage.

lifecycle_cost.note: ensemble trained on benchmark labels (no oracle queries); DAgger training queries amortized over designed cargos

decision_rule.route_C: best_search_qb128 >= 0.95 (or dagger+limited >= 0.95 with cheap search also >= 0.95)
